steps.title: Locate the right angle
steps.content: Angles $A$ and $B$ are acute, so the right angle is at $C$. That makes $AC$ and $BC$ the legs of the right triangle.

steps.title: Set up tangent
steps.content:
For angle $B$, side $AC$ is opposite and side $BC$ is adjacent.
$$\tan B=\frac{AC}{BC}$$
$$\frac{1}{8}=\frac{31.4}{BC}$$

steps.title: Solve for the side
steps.content: Cross-multiply to isolate $BC$. $$BC=31.4\cdot8=251.2$$ The answer is B.
